summary: Social Card feature (Step 2 of Social Chat Evolution) fully tested. Backend API GET /api/users/{user_id}/social-card returns user info, last 12 films with poster_url/likes_count/user_liked/quality_score, friend_status, is_online, and is_own_profile. Frontend modal opens when clicking non-bot users in chat sidebar, shows 6-column grid of films with mini posters, like buttons work correctly, navigation to film detail and full profile works.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Social Card feature fully tested. Test users with films: Emilians (7e1bb9ec-91f7-4f8e-9ff2-5f400896ba44, 5 films), mic (8bd4396f-c6dc-4bc9-9e2a-8a0ed7855ec4, 4 films). Test user without films: Benny (a0081c6d-268d-4093-b57f-2c568d8b59be). Chat page at /chat, users panel on right side, clicking non-bot user opens UserProfileModal with social card.

backend: GET /api/users/{user_id}/social-card - returns user info (nickname, avatar_url, production_house_name, level)
GET /api/users/{user_id}/social-card - returns films array with id, title, poster_url, likes_count, user_liked, quality_score
GET /api/users/{user_id}/social-card - user with no films returns empty films array
POST /api/films/{film_id}/like - like toggle works from social card context
POST /api/films/{film_id}/like - likes_count updates correctly on toggle
frontend: Chat page loads at /chat with users panel on right
Clicking non-bot user in sidebar opens UserProfileModal
Modal shows user info: nickname, avatar, production house, level badge, presence status
Modal shows 'Messaggio' button that starts DM and closes modal
Modal shows 'Profilo' button that navigates to /player/{user_id}
Modal shows friend request button (UserPlus icon)
Modal shows films grid with 6-column layout (grid-cols-6)
Each film shows mini poster image
Each film shows like count with heart icon
Like button toggles correctly (heart fills/unfills, count updates)
User with no films shows 'Nessun film ancora' message
